atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports chronic abdominal pain and diarrhea.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing chronic abdominal pain and intermittent diarrhea for approximately two years.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is typically located in the mid-abdomen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain fluctuates in intensity.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports periods of constipation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports episodes of explosive diarrhea.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the diarrhea is often triggered by specific foods.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the diarrhea has been more pronounced over the past couple of months.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a CT scan revealed no abnormalities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any prior surgeries.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes Crestor daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes olmesartan daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient occasionally uses Tylenol for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a family history of irritable bowel syndrome in his sister.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports an increased stool burden.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals a slight enlargement of the liver on the upper right side.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports hepatomegaly.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports chronic abdominal pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports diarrhea.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals a slight tenderness to palpation in the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a follow-up appointment in four weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Recommend a fiber supplement to manage constipation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Discuss the possibility of adjusting medications, particularly Crestor, with the primary care physician.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Arrange for a liver ultrasound to evaluate the liver enlargement.
